evals.prompt: Black Friday margin collapsed. Codes SUMMER20 and VIP15 both blew past expected redemptions — SUMMER20 showed up on a deal subreddit. I have usage counts and total discount $ per code. Margin after COGS is usually 42% on net revenue. Build a view and risk read.
evals.expected_output: Master table Code | Usage | Profit | Risk; leak narrative; strategy fixes.
expectations: Includes table with columns Discount code, Usage count, Profit brought, Risk assessment
Addresses margin collapse and social/leak context
Computes or frames profit using margin or discount data
Risk assessment includes High/Med/Low or equivalent with reasons
Includes discount strategy correction ideas (rotate, cap, segment)

evals.prompt: One code WELCOME10 has 8,000 uses in two weeks — we expected 500. Gross sales look great but finance says profit is weak. No forum post found yet. What should the table look like and how do we assess risk?
evals.expected_output: Table schema + usage spike = high risk; profit line; investigation steps.
expectations: Links high usage to abuse or leak risk
Profit brought column explained or estimated with assumptions
Risk assessment column populated or templated

evals.prompt: Suggest three cute names for our spring sale campaign.
evals.expected_output: Names only; no full abuse table (should-not-trigger).
expectations: Does not output full discount abuse monitoring table as primary deliverable
May skip profit and risk columns for unrelated ask
